notes: Cross-referenced from Philippine Primer (Mar 2025), morefunwithjuan.com, sakay.ph P2P explorer, philippinebeaches.org, outoftownblog.com, taguigeno.com, busesandferries.com, Wikipedia. Froehlich Tours confirmed defunct. Fares and schedules subject to change.

routes.frequency_notes: Approximately every 30 min weekdays 5:30AM–9:30PM; limited Saturday/Sunday service
routes.notes: Operator: RRCG Transport. Discounted fare ₱88 (SC/PWD/students). Beep Card and cash accepted. Via SLEX.

routes.frequency_notes: 30+ daily trips weekdays 6:30AM–10PM; 9 trips Saturday; limited Sunday
routes.notes: Operator: RRCG Transport. Discounted fare ₱112. Via EDSA (bus lane exempt for P2P) or C-5. Also stops at Robinsons Galleria.

routes.origin: Robinsons Antipolo / SM Masinag / Ayala Malls Feliz
routes.frequency_notes: Multiple trips weekdays 5AM–7AM from Antipolo; return PM peaks 5:30PM–7:30PM
routes.notes: Operator: RRCG Transport. Discounted fare ₱112. Also serves Ayala Malls Feliz stop.

routes.origin: Robinsons Cainta / Sierra Valley, Cainta, Rizal
routes.frequency_notes: Weekday AM peak departures from Cainta; PM peak returns from Makati
routes.notes: Operator: RRCG Transport. Discounted fare ₱72. Optional Robinsons Galleria stop ₱60 regular/₱48 discounted. Short Cainta–Ortigas segment.

routes.frequency_notes: Weekdays only; departures from Fairview 5:30AM–10AM; return from Makati approximately every 30 min
routes.notes: Operator: RRCG Transport. Discounted fare ₱128. Longest RRCG intra-NCR P2P route. Via C-5 or EDSA.

routes.frequency_notes: Saturday 7AM–10PM; Sunday 10AM–10PM
routes.notes: Operator: RRCG Transport. Discounted fare ₱88. Weekend-only variant of Alabang ATC route.

routes.frequency_notes: Multiple daily trips Monday–Friday 5:30AM–7:30PM
routes.notes: Operator: HM Transport Inc. Discounted fare ₱100. Via EDSA or C-5 southbound.

routes.frequency_notes: Monday–Saturday 9AM–7:30PM
routes.notes: Operator: HM Transport Inc. Discounted fare ₱80. Shorter Alabang variant.

routes.route_name: One Ayala Makati–Nuvali, Sta. Rosa, Laguna
routes.destination: Nuvali Transport Terminal, Sta. Rosa, Laguna
routes.frequency_notes: Monday–Saturday; schedule varies
routes.notes: Operator: HM Transport / TAS Trans. Discounted fare ₱160. Via SLEX.

routes.frequency_notes: Daily service; 6AM–10PM from Makati (approx. hourly)
routes.notes: Operator: HM Transport. Via SLEX. Fare estimate from context; Saint Rose Transit also serves this corridor at ₱160.

routes.frequency_notes: On-demand, no fixed schedule; 30min–1hr wait expected; 4AM–8PM
routes.notes: Operator: UBE Express (Air Freight 2100). Cash and Beep Card. Boarding: T3 arrival area Bay 12 outer lane.

routes.frequency_notes: 12 trips each direction daily; 4:30AM–8PM outbound / 4:45AM–7:45PM return
routes.notes: Operator: UBE Express. Cash and Beep Card accepted.

routes.frequency_notes: On-demand; 4AM–8PM; 30min–1hr wait
routes.notes: Operator: UBE Express. Connects airport arrivals to Pasay bus terminals.

routes.frequency_notes: 4 trips each way daily; 6AM–4:20PM outbound / 7:30AM–6:30PM return
routes.notes: Operator: UBE Express.

routes.frequency_notes: 9 trips each direction daily; 5:30AM–8:30PM outbound / 6AM–8PM return
routes.notes: Operator: UBE Express (Air Freight 2100). Via EDSA or C-5 northbound.

routes.frequency_notes: 4 trips each way daily; 3:30AM–4:50PM outbound / 5AM–6:30PM return
routes.notes: Operator: UBE Express. Added November 2024.

routes.frequency_notes: ~20 trips each way daily; 2:30AM–11PM outbound / 4AM–1AM return. Most frequent UBE route.
routes.notes: Operator: UBE Express. Via SLEX. Highest frequency airport route.

routes.frequency_notes: 11 outbound departures 5:30AM–6PM; 11 inbound departures 6:30AM–7:30PM; weekdays only
routes.notes: Operator: Delta Neosolutions (DNS). Sakay ID: P2P:R_3126KJ3. Return stop: Miriam College Football Field (not UP Town Center). TRIPKO cashless card available at One Ayala Terminal; min load ₱100.

routes.frequency_notes: Weekdays; details on Sakay.ph
routes.notes: Operator: Delta Neosolutions. Sakay ID: P2P:R_CQ76B22. Fare not confirmed publicly. Via Eastwood; coordinates with DNS UP Town Center route.

routes.frequency_notes: Weekdays; first trip 6AM from VTaguig; 9AM from Trasierra; last 6:30PM/7:30PM
routes.notes: Operator: MetroExpress Connect Inc. Part of Vista Mall corridor P2P network.

routes.frequency_notes: Weekdays
routes.notes: Operator: MetroExpress Connect Inc. Via C-5.

routes.route_name: Vista Mall Daang Hari Bacoor–Starmall Alabang
routes.origin: Vista Mall Daang Hari, Bacoor, Cavite
routes.frequency_notes: 42 trips from Bacoor (6AM–8PM); 45 trips from Alabang (6:45AM–9PM); daily
routes.notes: Operator: MetroExpress Connect. ₱50 introductory fare (2018 launch); current fare may differ. Discounted ₱40.

routes.frequency_notes: Weekdays; first trip 5:30AM from Bacoor; 7AM from Makati; last 5:30PM/7PM
routes.notes: Operator: MetroExpress Connect. Via CAVITEX.

routes.frequency_notes: Daily; 4AM–8PM from Calamba; every hour 6AM–10PM from Makati
routes.notes: Operator: Saint Rose Transit (Calamba P2P Inc.). Terminal at Brgy. Uno, Crossing, Calamba. Makati terminal relocated to beside Landmark/One Ayala due to Glorietta renovation. Contact: 09230832264 / 09178857788.

routes.frequency_notes: Daily Mon–Sun; 4AM–8PM from Calamba; 7AM–7:30PM from BGC; 1–1.5hr travel time
routes.notes: Operator: Saint Rose Transit. Via SLEX. Facebook: facebook.com/calambaP2P.

routes.frequency_notes: Daily Mon–Sun; 4AM–8PM from Calamba
routes.notes: Operator: Saint Rose Transit. Also serves Paciano, Calamba sub-stop. Lawton terminal in Ermita.

routes.origin: Robinsons Dasmariñas Pala Pala, Dasmariñas, Cavite
routes.frequency_notes: 4AM–10PM; last trip from Cubao ~9–10PM
routes.notes: Operator: Alabang Metrolink Bus Corp (Metro Link). Sakay ID: P2P:R_981DRLL. Via Governor's Drive → SLEX Carmona → SLEX → C-5. 2–3hr travel time. Reinstated after ~8-year gap.

routes.frequency_notes: 4:30AM–10PM; multiple daily trips
routes.notes: Operator: Alabang Metrolink Bus Corp. BGC Market! Market! segment fare: ₱57.

routes.origin: SM North EDSA / Trinoma, Quezon City
routes.destination: Various Bulacan terminals (Bocaue, Caypombo, Malolos, Sta. Clara, Pandi, Balagtas, Plaridel)
routes.frequency_notes: Daily service from Trinoma/SM North; 8 distinct Bulacan terminus routes
routes.notes: Operator: Precious Grace Transport Services (also listed as Riding Public First JV on some aggregators). 8 Bulacan P2P routes. Fare starts ₱70 depending on destination. Via North Luzon Expressway (NLEX).

routes.frequency_notes: First trip 5:45AM; schedule not published
routes.notes: Operator: COMET Bus / Global Electric Transport (GET Philippines). Electric bus. Payment: GETPass App (QR code cashless), GCash. Mentioned in Fairview terminal analysis as confirmed.

routes.frequency_notes: Daily; first trip 6AM
routes.notes: Operator: COMET Bus / GET Philippines. Electric bus. GETPass required.

routes.route_name: SM Lipa/Batangas City–Market! Market! BGC–SM Megamall Ortigas
routes.origin: SM Lipa / Batangas City Grand Terminal
routes.frequency_notes: Multiple daily trips; Batangas-based schedule
routes.notes: Operator: Alps the Bus Inc. BGC and Ortigas act as P2P dropoff points for Metro Manila segment. Sakay ID P2P:R_6AMT3D2 (Megamall–SM North–Trinoma–Park Square intra-Metro loop also listed).

routes.frequency_notes: Monday–Friday; first trip 4:30AM; last 9:30PM
routes.notes: Operator: Genesis Transport. Via NLEX/SCTEX. Drops at SM North EDSA northbound. Also operates NAIA T3–Clark route.

routes.frequency_notes: Not confirmed
routes.notes: Operator: N. Dela Rosa Liner. Confirmed in Lawton terminal analysis (Run 45). Semi-express format, not standard P2P. Via SLEX/South Superhighway.

routes.origin: SM City North EDSA, Quezon City
routes.frequency_notes: DEFUNCT — franchise expired ~2020
routes.notes: Operator: Froehlich/Froelich Tours (DEFUNCT). Ceased due to Wirecard scandal-linked financial problems. Weekend fare was ₱50. Discounted ₱50/₱40. Retained for historical reference and gap identification.

routes.frequency_notes: DEFUNCT — franchise expired ~2020
routes.notes: Operator: Froehlich/Froelich Tours (DEFUNCT). Weekday ₱95 / weekend ₱75. Discounted ₱70/₱60. Historical reference — Froehlich closure creates northern QC→Makati P2P gap not yet backfilled.
